goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should go to 'london liverpool street' and should 'leave after 10:00'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '4 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'cityroomz'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on sunday
The train should go to london liverpool street and should leave after 10:00
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 4 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called cityroomz
Make sure you get postcode and area
